name: rockstarr-content
description: Rockstarr AI long-form drafting plugin. Four publishing lanes (researched blog, thought leadership, email newsletter, LinkedIn newsletter) gated by the client's stack cadence, plus interview-driven case studies and repurposed derivatives. Every lane drafts in the client's approved voice from first-party knowledge base material; third-party sources live in References only. Thought-leadership lane is now outline-first via outline-thought-leadership and runs the canonical TL rubric as a post-draft gate before stop-slop. Every prose output runs through the shared stop-slop skill as a mandatory final pass before landing in 03_drafts/content/. Monthly planning pass (ideate → pick → calendar → approve) then per-piece drafting on the calendar's schedule. Requires rockstarr-infra v0.8.1+ for the shared TL rubric reference; v0.4+ for content-cadence stack fields, the shared case-study prompt, and the shared stop-slop skill.
